title: A Man Escaped
originalTitle: Un condamné à mort s'est échappé
tmdbOverview: A captured French Resistance fighter during World War II engineers a daunting escape from prison.
synopsis: Released in 1956, A Man Escaped is a drama and thriller film from France. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.2 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 1950s and genre rankings. It carries a AL certification (NL rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
